description_zh: Rolex（劳力士）是全球最负盛名的瑞士奢侈腕表品牌，由汉斯·威尔斯多夫于1905年在伦敦创立，1908年正式注册"Rolex"商标，后于1919年将总部迁至瑞士日内瓦。劳力士在钟表发展史上拥有众多里程碑式的创新：1926年发明了世界上第一枚防水蚝式表壳（Oyster），1927年梅塞迪丝·吉莉斯佩戴劳力士腕表横渡英吉利海峡，蚝式防水性能一举成名；1931年推出永久性自动上链转子系统，成为现代自动机械表的基石。劳力士腕表凭借其精准、耐用与奢华的完美结合，成为身份与成就的象征。品牌产品线涵盖Submariner潜航者、Daytona迪通拿、Datejust日志型、Day-Date星期日历型以及GMT-Master II格林尼治型等经典系列，每一款都凝聚着瑞士制表工匠的精湛技艺。作为瑞士制表业的标杆品牌，劳力士年产量约100万枚，以极高的品质标准和稀缺性维持着其无可撼动的行业地位。

languages.en: Rolex is the world's most iconic luxury watch brand, founded in 1905 by Hans Wilsdorf in London before relocating to Geneva in 1919. Renowned for groundbreaking innovations, Rolex created the first waterproof wristwatch case (Oyster) in 1926 and the first self-winding mechanism with a perpetual rotor in 1931. These inventions became the foundation of modern mechanical watchmaking. Collections like Submariner, Daytona, Datejust, Day-Date, and GMT-Master II are cultural icons symbolizing precision, durability, and prestige. Each Rolex is crafted with meticulous Swiss engineering and rigorous quality standards, making it the benchmark for luxury timepieces worldwide. With an annual production of approximately one million watches, Rolex maintains its unrivaled status through uncompromising quality, controlled scarcity, and timeless design.
